'''Nir Rinit''' was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] agent who operated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naalol/Legends|Naalol]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Talnar" />
